hero.description: Power your logistics with intelligent routing, real-time tracking, and seamless multi-carrier integration. One API, unlimited possibilities.

features.title: Highly expert delivery infrastructure
features.subtitle: Everything you need to power world-class delivery experiences, from real-time tracking to intelligent routing.

realtime.title: Real-Time Tracking

multicarrier.title: Multi-Carrier Support
multicarrier.description: One API to connect 120+ carriers worldwide. Automatic rate shopping finds the best option.

rates.title: Smart Rate Shopping
rates.description: Compare rates across carriers instantly. Save up to 40% on shipping costs automatically.

labels.title: Label Generation

webhooks.title: Instant Webhooks
webhooks.description: Real-time event notifications. Never poll for updates again with our reliable webhook system.

analytics.title: Advanced Analytics
analytics.description: Deep insights into performance, costs, and delivery times. Make data-driven decisions.

integrations.title: Works with your stack
integrations.subtitle: Seamlessly connect with the tools you already use. No complicated setup required.

api.title: Built for developers
api.subtitle: Clean, predictable APIs with comprehensive SDKs for every major language.
api.feature1: Type-safe SDKs for all major languages

faq.title: Got questions?
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about ORDEX and our delivery API platform.

q1.question: How quickly can I integrate ORDEX?
q1.answer: Most developers are up and running within a few hours. Our SDKs handle all the complexity, and our documentation includes copy-paste examples for common use cases.

q2.question: Which carriers do you support?
q2.answer: We support 120+ carriers worldwide including FedEx, UPS, DHL, USPS, and dozens of regional carriers. Our automatic carrier selection chooses the best option based on your criteria.

q3.question: What's your uptime guarantee?
q3.answer: We guarantee 99.9% uptime SLA for all paid plans. Our infrastructure is distributed across multiple regions with automatic failover.

q4.question: Can I use ORDEX for international shipping?
q4.answer: Absolutely! ORDEX supports international shipping to 200+ countries. We handle customs documentation and compliance requirements automatically.

q5.question: How does pricing work?
q5.answer: We offer simple per-shipment pricing with no hidden fees. Start free with 1,000 shipments/month, then scale as you grow.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free, scale as you grow. No hidden fees.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for testing and small projects

cta.title: Ready to ship smarter?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses using ORDEX to power their delivery operations.

footer.description: Next-generation delivery infrastructure for the modern world. Fast, reliable, and intelligent logistics.
